name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Oklahoma City, OK's Cash America Pawn at 1600 NW 23rd St offers quick cash loans on personal items with flexible terms and no credit checks.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn in Oklahoma City, OK is located at 1600 NW 23rd St, a convenient northwest location for quick pawning and collateral lending. The store operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, and Saturdays from 9 AM to 5 PM, making it accessible for most work schedules. This standalone pawn shop serves the Oklahoma City area with straightforward lending solutions for immediate cash needs.

At the 1600 NW 23rd St location in Oklahoma City, you can pawn personal items—jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, and collectibles—for instant cash without credit checks or lengthy applications. The team is available at +1 405-525-9403 to answer questions about what items you can bring in or to discuss loan terms before you visit. Whether you're looking to get cash fast or find affordable deals on secondhand merchandise, this Oklahoma City pawn shop is ready to help.

If you need emergency cash without a bank loan or credit check, Cash America Pawn at 1600 NW 23rd St in Oklahoma City, OK is an accessible option. Bring a valid photo ID and the items you want to pawn, and staff can typically give you an offer within minutes. As a neighborhood pawn shop, it handles straightforward transactions with transparent terms.
pros: Largest network of pawn locations (3,300+) across 29 U.S. states, providing accessibility and convenience
No credit check required for pawn loans—serves credit-constrained consumers who cannot access traditional lending
Non-recourse loans mean borrowers have no deficiency liability if pawned items don't sell for full loan amount
Fast cash access—pawn loans are processed on-site with immediate payment
Diverse merchandise buying (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods) means many items can be converted to cash
Additional services beyond pawn loans including gold/precious metal buying, layaway plans, and retail merchandise sales
Institutional credibility—indexed in S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 with ~22,000 employees across three continents
Transparent layaway service option (10% down) for customers who prefer installment purchasing
cons: Pawn loans require surrendering personal possessions as collateral, creating loss risk if unable to repay
Loans are non-recourse, meaning the company retains pledged items if redemption doesn't occur—customers lose property
Interest and fees apply to pawn loans; total cost of borrowing is not detailed on website, making true APR unclear
Item valuations are determined by individual store assessment, creating inconsistency and potential for undervaluation across locations
Pawn loans perpetuate a cycle for financially stressed consumers rather than addressing underlying credit or income issues
best_for: Unbanked or credit-constrained consumers who need immediate cash and lack access to traditional loans or credit cards
Individuals with valuable personal property (jewelry, electronics, instruments) who need short-term liquidity without credit qualification
People seeking alternative to payday loans who have collateral they can safely pledge temporarily
Customers in rural or underserved areas where FirstCash's 3,300-location network provides convenient access
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers with valuable personal property who need immediate cash without credit qualification or traditional lending approval. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering collateral with no guarantee of redemption, and true borrowing costs (interest and fees) are not transparently disclosed on their website—borrowers should confirm rates before pledging items.
services: Pawn loans secured by pledged personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, instruments, appliances, sporting goods)
Retail sales of merchandise (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold and precious metal buying with immediate cash payment
Layaway service with 10% down payment option
Item inventory search and store locator across 3,300+ locations
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions through AFF subsidiary and 15,000+ merchant partner locations
Buy services for general merchandise of value
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 1600 NW 23rd St, Oklahoma City, OK. Quick cash loans on personal items, no credit check, open Mon–Fri 9AM–7PM.
